spec_match.rationale: Native compliance. Uses a single comma query @container demo-box (width < 280px), demo-box (width > 800px) to style the same .theme-card at two non-contiguous bounds (logical OR).

interactive.rationale: Dual interactivity: a range slider AND native CSS box drag resize handle (resize: horizontal), with clean, real-time state syncs.

edge_cases.rationale: Integrates clean resize observers that handle dynamic dragging smoothly.

design_system.rationale: Very elegant. High-contrast inverted hero card, comfortable padding, clear badge indicators.

summary: An excellent theme switcher demonstration applying non-contiguous container widths (narrow OR wide) to a single target visual block natively.
